news.t: First Trust Launches BUFQ, the First Laddered Portfolio Utilizing Nasdaq-100® Buffer ETFs

overview.description: The FT Vest Laddered Nasdaq Buffer ETF (BUFQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds that holds a laddered portfolio of four FT Vest Nasdaq-100 Buffer ETFs. BUFQ was launched on Jun 15, 2022 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: First Trust Launches BUFQ, the First Laddered Portfolio Utilizing Nasdaq-100® Buffer ETFs
data.text: WHEATON, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First Trust Advisors L.P. (“First Trust”) a leading exchange-traded fund (“ETF”) provider and asset manager, announced today that it has launched the FT Cboe Vest Fund ...
